visual.name: BFVZPowerGantt
visual.description: Professional schedule visualization with typed dependencies (FS/SS/FF/SF with lag), critical path detection with longest-path fallback, program-level critical path across all projects, phase grouping, 2-level hierarchy (Project → Phase → Tasks), light/dark theme, synchronized dual-panel layout, adaptive time scaling, fiscal year labeling with configurable FY start month, near-critical path highlighting with total float, reference lines and bands, data grid columns, conditional RAG formatting with rules engine, hybrid progress, baseline variance shading with drift ribbons, configurable look-ahead schedule filter with days/weeks/months units, multi-utility dependency color coding with user-defined discipline slots, special milestone markers with aging alerts, custom milestone shapes (Diamond/Triangle/Circle/Star/Flag), cross-project resource conflict detection, program health metrics in summary tooltips, weekend and holiday non-working period shading, resource management, self-service filterable data roles (Company, Owner PM, Owner Controller, Contractor PM), and fully customizable theming. Supports datasets up to 30,000 rows.

dataRoles.name: milestoneType
dataRoles.description: Optional. Values: 'permit', 'regulatory', 'inspection', 'handoff', or blank for standard. Permit milestones render as shield icons with aging alerts.

dataRoles.name: resourceDiscipline
dataRoles.description: Optional. Trade discipline for dependency color coding (e.g., Electrical, Mechanical, Telecom, Fire/LS, Civil). Dependencies inherit color from successor task discipline.

dataRoles.name: refLineDate
dataRoles.description: Date column for dynamic reference lines. Unique non-null values create vertical markers.

dataRoles.name: refLineLabel
dataRoles.description: Label column for dynamic reference lines.

dataRoles.name: refBandStart
dataRoles.description: Start date column for dynamic reference bands (shaded ranges).

dataRoles.name: refBandEnd
dataRoles.description: End date column for dynamic reference bands.

dataRoles.name: refBandLabel
dataRoles.description: Label column for dynamic reference bands.

dataRoles.name: gridColumn1
dataRoles.description: Custom data column displayed in the left-panel data grid.

dataRoles.name: gridColumn2
dataRoles.description: Custom data column displayed in the left-panel data grid.

dataRoles.name: company
dataRoles.description: Responsible company or organization for each task. Use as a slicer to filter by contractor.

dataRoles.name: ownerProjectManager
dataRoles.description: Owner-side project manager assigned to this task. Use as a slicer to filter by owner PM.

dataRoles.name: ownerController
dataRoles.description: Owner-side project controller assigned to this task. Use as a slicer to filter by controller.

dataRoles.name: contractorProjectManager
dataRoles.description: Contractor-side project manager for each task. Use as a slicer to filter by contractor PM.

dataRoles.name: wbsPath
dataRoles.description: Delimiter-separated WBS hierarchy path (e.g., 'Program\Project\Area\Phase\WorkPackage'). When mapped, enables N-level hierarchy. When unmapped, the visual uses Project + Phase as a 2-level hierarchy.

progressMode.description: Manual: use Progress field. Hybrid: use Progress if >0, else auto-calc from Data Date. DataDate: always auto-calc. None: hide progress.

wbsDelimiter.description: Character used to split the WBS Path into hierarchy levels. Default: backslash (P6 native format).

wbsIndentWidth.description: Pixels of left indentation added per hierarchy level in the label panel.

wbsHierarchyMode.description: Which fields drive the visual hierarchy. 'Project → Phase' uses the classic 2-level grouping. 'WBS Path' uses the WBS Path field for N-level hierarchy (Phase is ignored). When WBS Path is selected but the data role is unmapped, falls back to Project → Phase automatically.

wbsDisplayDepth.description: Maximum WBS depth to display. Levels below this are rolled up into summary bars. 'All' shows every level.

gridConfig.description: Transform the left panel into a configurable multi-column data grid. Enable columns for Duration, Dates, Progress, Float, Resources, and custom data fields.

gridShow.description: Transform left panel from simple labels into a multi-column data grid.

gc_gc1_show.description: Drag a column into the 'Grid Column 1' data role to populate.

gc_gc2_show.description: Drag a column into the 'Grid Column 2' data role to populate.

varianceConfig.description: Semi-transparent ribbon between baseline and actual bars showing schedule drift. Green when ahead/on-plan, red when behind baseline.

varShow.description: Display shaded polygon connecting baseline bar edges to actual bar edges.

varAheadColor.description: Ribbon color when actual is ahead of or equal to baseline.

varBehindColor.description: Ribbon color when actual is behind baseline.

permitConfig.description: Special rendering for user-flagged milestone markers. Milestones matching the Special Type value display as shield icons with aging alerts when overdue. Set milestoneType in your dataset to any value (e.g. 'permit', 'inspection', 'hold').

permitShow.description: Render milestones whose milestoneType matches the Special Type value as shield icons with aging behavior.

specialType.description: Value to match in the milestoneType data field. Case-insensitive. Default: 'permit'. Change to match your dataset (e.g. 'inspection', 'hold', 'regulatory').

permitShieldColor.description: Base fill/outline color for special milestone shield icon.

permitAmberDays.description: Days overdue before special milestone pulses amber. Default: 15.

permitRedDays.description: Days overdue before special milestone pulses red. Default: 30.

permitAmberColor.description: Pulse color for special milestones overdue beyond amber threshold.

permitRedColor.description: Pulse color for special milestones overdue beyond red threshold.

permitPulseSpeed.description: Animation cycle duration for aging pulse effect.

disciplineColors.description: Color-code dependency arrows by the successor task's resource discipline. Define up to 8 discipline names to match values in the Resource Discipline data role. Critical path deps always override.

discShow.description: Color dependency arrows based on the successor task's resource discipline.

disc0Name.description: Discipline name to match against Resource Discipline values (e.g. Electrical, HVAC, Networking).

discFallback.description: Color for disciplines not matching any of the 8 slots above. Leave blank to use default dep color.

calendarConfig.description: Fiscal year labeling, weekend shading, and holiday non-working periods.

fyStart.description: Month number (1–12) that begins the fiscal year. 1 = Calendar Year (Jan), 10 = US Federal FY (Oct), 4 = UK/India FY (Apr).

calShowWeekends.description: Shade Saturday/Sunday with a subtle background band at Month and Week zoom levels.

lookAheadConfig.description: Configure 3 quick-access look-ahead buttons with customizable durations. Days (D), Weeks (W), or Months (M). Construction PMs use 2-week and 6-week look-ahead windows daily.

laActive.description: Which button is active. 1/2/3 = slot, All = no filter. Typically set via the floating overlay buttons.

laDimOp.description: Opacity for tasks outside the look-ahead window (0–100). Lower = more dimmed.

laMode.description: How tasks outside the look-ahead window are handled. Dim: reduces opacity. Hide: removes them from the view entirely.

laV1.description: Duration value for the first look-ahead button. Default: 2.

laU1.description: D = Days, W = Weeks, M = Months.

laV2.description: Duration value for the second look-ahead button. Default: 4.

laV3.description: Duration value for the third look-ahead button. Default: 6.

nearCritConfig.description: Styling for tasks with total float between 1 day and the configured threshold. These tasks are at risk of becoming critical.

nearCritThreshold.description: Tasks with total float between 1 and this value are highlighted as near-critical. Default: 10 days.

nearCritPulseDisplay.description: Static: solid colored outline. Pulse: animated flashing outline. None: no outline indicator (bar fill still applies).

nearCritPulseSpeed.description: Duration of one flash cycle in seconds. Lower = faster.

showFloat.description: Display total float value (in days) above task bars. Only shown for tasks with float > 0.

mkShape.description: Default shape for standard milestones. Special milestones always use shield. Diamond is the PMBOK standard.

refLineConfig.description: Vertical reference lines at specific dates. Use data roles for dynamic lines from your dataset, or manually define up to 5 static lines below.

rlDash.description: SVG dash-array pattern. Default: '4 3'. Use '0' for solid lines.

refBandConfig.description: Shaded date ranges overlaid on the Gantt chart. Use data roles for dynamic bands from your dataset, or manually define up to 5 static bands below.

overallocThreshold.description: Percentage of capacity above which a resource is considered overallocated. Default 100%.

pulseSpeed.description: Duration of one pulse cycle in seconds.

overallocDisplay.description: How overallocated tasks are visually highlighted. Static: solid colored border. Pulse: animated pulsing border. None: no visual indicator (tooltip data still shown).

tooltipMode.description: Compact shows title, dates, progress, and float. Detailed shows all enabled fields.

showWbsPath.description: Display the WBS hierarchy breadcrumb in task tooltips.

programCritConfig.description: Cross-project program-level critical path. Identifies the longest path through the entire program, spanning all projects.

progCritShow.description: Enable program-level critical path analysis across all projects
